core_principles: Movement is Art: Treat every layout like a pose—balanced, intentional, and fluid.
Silence is loud: Use massive whitespace to create authority.
Texture over Gloss: Use grain, matte colors, and serif fonts instead of digital gradients.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tight leading-[0.9] font-medium
scale.caption: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-muted-foreground

usage_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use solid colors or noise textures only.
usage_rules.borders: Use 1px borders with 10% opacity for a 'etched' look.

grid_strategies.name: The Tetris Grid
grid_strategies.rules: Mix col-span-1 (square) and col-span-2 (landscape) items. Never use a perfect uniform grid.

grid_strategies.name: The Editorial Split
grid_strategies.rules: 50/50 split on desktop, stacked on mobile. Text must be sticky on scroll if image is tall.

layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Avoid heavy rounding to keep it masculine/strong.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/20 text-primary h-12 px-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground rounded-none transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-500 rounded-none group

forms.input: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors
forms.datepicker: Use Shadcn Calendar but styled with Playfair Display for month headers.

images.styling_rules: All images must have a subtle grain overlay or desaturation filter to match the organic mood. Use object-cover.

required_effects: Text Reveal: Staggered fade-up for headings.
Parallax: Background images move slower than foreground content.
Magnetic Buttons: Subtle movement on hover.
motion.reduced_motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' by disabling parallax and heavy transforms.

functionality.booking: Use standard HTML form for inputs, but embed Calendly for the actual time slot selection if needed, or use a custom DatePicker (Shadcn) + Time Select.
functionality.gallery: Lightbox functionality for Retreats and Transformations.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients. Use solid colors.
Do not center everything. Asymmetry creates tension.
